summary: A doctest in doc/callbacks.rst at line 48 failed while the main pytest suite passed. The doctest expected output did not match actual output.
root_cause: Doctest in doc/callbacks.rst line 48 produced output that did not match the expected result.

evidence.reason: Specifies the exact location and type of failure
Confirms that the main pytest suite succeeded, isolating the failure to the doctest

suggested_fix: Review and fix the doctest in doc/callbacks.rst at line 48 to match the current behavior of the code.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
